comment.body:
Based on this:

Reversion model shows a 70.72% probability for a reversion for ES=F, and 71.63% for SPX.
If reversion would occur, my primal target would be 5900.18 for SPX and 5926.38 for ES=F (with VIX towards 19.13), a close beyond these lines would be trend shifting in the short-run, but to me the probabilities are too low yet, but you can size accordingly depending on your style, or just watch and wait for the macros to unfold. 

It seems like she sees upside today?
